help.menu_updated: Help menu updated. Select a topic below:

content.driver_overview:
*Getting Started with ParkAddis*

ParkAddis helps you find, reserve, and manage parking across Addis Ababa.

To get started:
1. Tap "Find parking" from the menu and share your location
2. Browse available spots near you on the map or list
3. Select a spot, choose your time, and confirm your booking
4. Complete payment to secure your reservation
5. Present your confirmation code or QR to the host upon arrival

Use the menu below to explore any topic in detail.
content.driver_find:
*Finding Parking*

*Share your location:*
Tap "Find parking" from the main menu. ParkAddis will show available spots near your current location.

*Browse by area:*
Select "Browse by area" to explore parking options by neighbourhood — Bole, Piassa, Kazanchis, Mexico Square, and more.

*Interactive Map:*
After searching, tap "Open interactive map" to view all spots on a map. Each pin shows a numbered marker matching the list below the map.

*Spot Details:*
Tap any spot to see its address, hourly price, distance, capacity, amenities, and ratings. From there you can book directly or get directions.
content.driver_booking:
*Booking & Payments*

*Making a Reservation:*
1. Select a spot and tap "Book this spot"
2. Choose when you want to park (now, 30min, 1h, 2h)
3. Choose how long you need (1-12 hours, or custom)
4. Review the booking summary with total cost
5. Confirm your reservation

*Payment Options:*
After reserving, you can pay via:
- *Chapa* — Pay securely with Telebirr, CBE Birr, or card
- *Manual Transfer* — Bank or mobile money transfer

*Promo Codes:*
If you have a promo code, you can apply it during checkout for a discount.

*Waitlist:*
If a spot is fully booked for your time, join the waitlist. We'll notify you when a spot opens up.
content.driver_manage:
*Managing Bookings*

*View Your Bookings:*
Tap "My Bookings" from the main menu to see all your reservations.

*Booking Statuses:*
- *Pending* — Awaiting payment
- *Reserved* — Reserved, payment pending confirmation
- *Confirmed* — Payment received, spot secured
- *Active* — Checked in, currently parking
- *Completed* — Parking session finished
- *Cancelled* — Booking was cancelled
- *Expired* — Booking time has passed

*Modify or Cancel:*
From the booking details, you can:
- *Extend* — Add more hours to an active booking
- *Cancel* — Cancel a booking (refund policy applies)

*Favorites:*
Save spots you like by tapping the favorite button. Access them anytime from "My Favorites" to quickly rebook.
content.driver_checkin:
*Check-in & Check-out*

*Check-in:*
When you arrive at the parking spot, show your confirmation code or QR code to the host. The host will check you in using:
- QR scanner — Scan your booking's QR code
- Confirmation code — Type your code manually, e.g. /checkin PK-ABC12

*Your QR Code:*
After payment is confirmed, you will receive a QR code. You can also view it from your booking details.

*Check-out (Complete):*
When you leave, the host will mark the booking as complete. You will then be prompted to rate your experience.

*Recurring Bookings:*
Need the same spot regularly? Set up recurring bookings (daily, weekly, or monthly) and we'll handle the reservations automatically.
content.driver_host:
*Becoming a Host*

Earn from your parking space by listing it on ParkAddis.

*How to list your spot:*
1. Tap "List your spot" from the menu
2. Share the location of your parking space
3. Add a name or address for your spot
4. Set your hourly price
5. Specify capacity (how many vehicles)
6. Select amenities (covered, guarded, EV charging)
7. Optionally add a photo
8. Submit — your spot goes live immediately

*Benefits:*
- Set your own price and availability
- Manage bookings and check-ins from the bot
- Earn money from unused parking space
- Receive notifications when someone books your spot
content.driver_faq:
*Troubleshooting & FAQ*

*Can't find parking spots?*
Make sure you've shared your location. If no spots appear, try browsing by area instead, or expand your search radius.

*Payment not going through?*
Check that you have sufficient funds in your Telebirr/CBE account. If Chapa fails, try the manual transfer option. Contact support if issues persist.

*Booking not showing?*
Tap "My Bookings" to refresh. If a booking was cancelled due to payment timeout, you can rebook.

*Forgot your confirmation code?*
Your code is shown in the booking confirmation message. You can also find it in "My Bookings".

*Host not responding?*
If you arrive and the host is unavailable, contact support with your booking details.

*How do ratings work?*
After each completed booking, you can rate the parking spot. Your feedback helps the community find quality parking options.
content.host_overview:
*Hosting with ParkAddis*

Welcome to hosting! ParkAddis lets you earn from your parking space by connecting you with drivers looking for convenient parking.

*Quick Start:*
Tap "List your spot" from the menu and follow the simple wizard to list your parking space. Once live, drivers can find and book it immediately.

Use the topics below to learn more about managing your spots and handling bookings.
content.host_listing:
*Listing a Parking Spot*

The listing wizard asks for:
1. *Location* — Share a map pin of where the spot is
2. *Address* — A name or address like "Edna Mall Parking"
3. *Price* — Your hourly rate in Birr
4. *Capacity* — How many vehicles can park
5. *Amenities* — Covered, guarded, EV charging options
6. *Photo* — Optional photo of the spot

Your spot goes live immediately after submission. You can pause, edit, or delete it anytime from "My Spots".
content.host_manage:
*Managing Your Spots*

From "My Spots" you can manage each of your listed parking spaces:

*Pause / Resume:*
Temporarily hide your spot from search results without deleting it. Useful when your space is unavailable.

*Edit Price:*
Change your hourly rate at any time. Updates take effect immediately.

*View Bookings:*
See upcoming bookings for each spot. Each booking shows the driver's name, time slot, and status. You can check in drivers directly from this list.

*Delete:*
Permanently remove a spot listing. This cannot be undone.

*Notifications:*
You will receive a notification when someone books your spot, including the driver's name, time, and confirmation code.
content.host_handling:
*Handling Bookings*

*When a Booking Comes In:*
You will receive a notification with the booking details: driver name, time slot, confirmation code, and total amount.

*Checking In a Driver:*
When the driver arrives, check them in using one of these methods:
1. *QR Code* — Use the /scanqr command to open the scanner and scan the driver's QR code
2. *Confirmation Code* — Ask the driver for their code and type /checkin PK-ABC12
3. *Booking Button* — From "My Spots" > "Bookings", tap the "Check in" button next to the booking

*Completing a Booking:*
When the driver leaves, tap "Mark as Complete". This triggers a rating prompt to the driver.

*What if a driver doesn't show?*
You can mark the booking as complete after the reserved time has passed.
content.host_payments:
*Host Payments*

When a driver pays for a booking via Chapa, the payment is processed securely through the Chapa payment gateway.

*Payment Flow:*
1. Driver reserves and pays
2. Payment is confirmed through Chapa
3. Driver checks in using their confirmation code or QR
4. Booking is marked as complete

*Important:*
- Ensure your account details are up to date
- Contact support for any payment or payout inquiries
- Keep records of completed bookings for your reference
content.host_faq:
*Host Troubleshooting & FAQ*

*Can't see my bookings?*
Tap "My Spots" then tap "Bookings" on the relevant spot. Only future bookings are shown.

*Can't check in a driver?*
Make sure the driver has completed payment (status should be confirmed or reserved). If the QR code won't scan, ask for the confirmation code and type /checkin CODE.

*Driver hasn't arrived?*
The booking is automatically held for the reserved time. If the driver doesn't show, you can mark as complete after the time slot ends.

*How do I change my price?*
From "My Spots", tap the spot, then tap "Price" to set a new hourly rate.

*Want to temporarily stop accepting bookings?*
Use the "Pause" button on your spot. It won't appear in search results until you resume it.
content.contact:
*Contact Support*

We're here to help. Reach out to us through any of the following channels:

*Email:*
Write to us at support@parkaddis.com and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

*Telegram:*
For quick assistance, send a message to our support team on Telegram.

*In-App Support:*
Describe your issue in detail so we can help you faster. Include relevant booking codes or reference numbers if applicable.

We aim to respond to all inquiries within 24 hours during business days.
